rounds: The 6am necklace purchase — no deliberating, no asking permission, just bought it — that one was yours. Painted toes on a Saturday, standing in the chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — that's two more they didn't get. The joy police showed up, though. They're still loud enough that Dante had to write you a note about it.
pattern: They're loudest when it's visible — quieter when you're alone and just doing the thing.
focus: Wear one gay thing somewhere new this week — somewhere the joy police would hate.
